addons.name: AI
addons.description: Owns AI provider configuration and versioned chat and embedding inference.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Chat
addons.description: Adds the AI chat sidebar and chat route settings.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Semantic Search
addons.description: Owns lexical retrieval and synchronizes AI-generated vectors into Knowledge.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: OCR
addons.description: Adds OCR with a package-owned native sidecar on supported desktop platforms.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Wiki
addons.description: Owns semantic Wiki proposals, evidence and accepted Wiki pages.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Graph
addons.description: Builds complete note and Wiki relationship graphs without a silent note cap.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Knowledge
addons.description: Runs the same Rust indexing, embeddings, semantic communities, graph and Wiki engine on desktop, Android and iOS.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Open Models
addons.description: Owns GGUF downloads, activation and local llama.cpp chat through a package service.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Codex Connection
addons.description: Owns ChatGPT subscription authentication, models, usage and chat through a package service.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Sync
addons.description: Owns persistent Iroh pairing, bidirectional vault synchronization, baselines and conflict management.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Calendar
addons.description: Imports and displays package-owned ICS events for the active vault.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Sites
addons.description: Previews static sites from permission-scoped vault directories on desktop, Android and iOS.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Code execution
addons.description: Runs local interpreters on desktop and isolated JavaScript Workers on Android and iOS.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Google Keep Import
addons.description: Imports Google Keep Takeout JSON files into scoped local Markdown notes.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Recently edited
addons.description: Adds a recently edited notes section to the sidebar.
addons.author: Elephant
